name: Unstable data produces inconsistent snapshots
query: The same story keeps changing avatar initials and timestamps between builds.
context: The user mentions generated IDs, current time, and random avatars inside the story data.
expected_behavior: Explains that unstable data changes the rendered output between runs
Recommends making story data deterministic before trying suppression-style fixes
success_criteria: The response names deterministic data as the fix path
The response avoids broad ignore guidance
